prompt: Describe the image in a long, detailed paragraph. Be thorough and cover the main subject, the setting, all visible objects, actions, spatial relationships, colors, and contextual details. Aim for a rich, complete description of the scene.

baseline.caption_ref:
The image depicts a busy highway with multiple cars driving underneath an overpass. There are at least nine vehicles on the road, including one truck located near the center-left side of the frame. Some cars can be seen further back, while others are closer to the front of the scene.

The highway is surrounded by trees that provide a natural background to the urban environment. Two traffic lights are present in the scene; one is situated towards the left side of the image, and another is found more centrally. Additionally, there's a person standing close to the right edge of the picture, possibly observing the traffic or waiting to cross the street.
